title: Deep Learning for Bird Identification Using Sound: Enhancing Avian Monitoring and Conservation in Indonesia and Malaysia
authors: M. Rifqi Dzaky Azhad, Rafiq Labib, Athila Ramdani Saputra, Edward Ferdian et al.
context: Macro F1 improved 44.1% over baseline on 219 endemic and endangered species. Field-validated at Bandung Zoo and Malaysia National Zoo. First author.

title: Deep Learning-Based Segmentation of Whole-Body Bone Scan Images Using nnU-Netv2
venue: International Journal of Intelligent Engineering and Systems (IJIES-INASS)
authors: Ema Rachmawati, M. Rifqi Dzaky Azhad et al.
context: Bone scan segmentation pipeline achieving patient-level AUC 0.956, above EXINI and BONENAVI. Second author.

title: From Segmentation to Biomarker Quantification: A Deep Learning Framework for Metastases Detection in Bone Scans
authors: Ema Rachmawati, M. Rifqi Dzaky Azhad, Ida Bagus Indrabudhi Kusuma, Yolanda Rahma Chrysti, Nasywa Kamila
context: Full diagnostic framework from bone scan segmentation through BSI biomarker quantification. Under journal review. Second author.

title: Whole-Body Bone Scintigraphy Segmentation Masks: Ground-Truth Annotations for Bone Area Segmentation
authors: Ema Rachmawati, M. Rifqi Dzaky Azhad
context: Publicly released ground-truth segmentation masks for whole-body bone scintigraphy. Open access.

title: CS Unplugged: Box Sorting Game
authors: Selly Meliana, Rafiq Labib, M. Rifqi Dzaky Azhad et al.
context: Computational thinking activity book for school outreach. Contributor.
